title: The Lanjia Saora Community
description: Source: TH Subject: Art and Culture Context: The Lanjia Saora community is in the news for its resilient efforts to preserve its unique visual heritage, such as traditional metal earrings and tattoos, while adapting these customs to modern lifestyles.
